option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ── Gradle daemon / performance ───────────────────────────────────────────── org.gradle.daemon=true org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2g -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError org.gradle.parallel=true org.gradle.caching=true
# ── Configuration cache ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Enabled as suggested by Gradle; the IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.2.x # claims configuration-cache compatibility. org.gradle.configuration-cache=true
# ── Kotlin ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── kotlin.incremental=true
# ── Note on Gradle 10 deprecation warnings ─────────────────────────────────── # The "multi-string dependency notation" warnings are emitted by the # IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin's own internal code (not by this build # script) and cannot be suppressed or fixed here. They will be resolved # when the upstream plugin ships a Gradle-10-compatible release.

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
